title: logania × armstrongii
intro: Logania × armstrongii, also known as Armstrong's Logania, is a hybrid plant species native to Australia, resulting from the cross between Logania filifolia and Logania longifolia. The plant contains bioactive compounds with potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Logania × armstrongii are still being researched, but it is believed to have antioxidant and anti-cancer properties, as well as the ability to modulate the immune system. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and skin problems.
